note: CAPSTONE / production answer for the carousel idea. Generalized fan-out F: F workers cooperate per query (revolution=N/F) in G=workers/F groups. F=1 packs (max throughput), F=8 shards (min latency). Sweep F x load -> the OPTIMAL F DECREASES with load: rate200->F8(4.5ms), 400->F4(6.5ms), 600->F2(11.5ms), 800->F1/2(20ms), 1000->F1(35ms). The optimal-F envelope NEVER cliffs (4.5ms@200 -> 35ms@1000) and beats per-query (017: 12ms then cliff >500). PRODUCTION RULE: F* ~= cores / in-flight-queries (elastic intra-query parallelism) - give each query an equal share of idle cores; spread at low load, pack under load. Idea WORKS; the tunable is fan-out, adapted to load.
